title: bumelia peckhamensis
intro: Bumelia peckhamensis, also known as the "Gumbo Limbo Tree" or "Bumelia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bumelia peckhamensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health issues.
